description: Tattoo Visual Intelligence Engine — Field Logic Protocol

content_type.reason: Core identifier — every piece of content has a type

visual_style.reason: Core identifier — the dominant visual aesthetic is always present

allow_unknown_when: lifestyle or process content with no branded product
product_category.reason: Only meaningful when a physical product is being shown

camera.shot_type.reason: Every image has a shot type

camera.camera_angle.reason: Every image has a camera angle

allow_unknown_when: single static product shot with no camera motion
camera.camera_movement.reason: Static images have no camera movement; unknown is correct here

camera.lens_feeling.reason: Lens characteristics are visible in the image quality

camera.depth_of_field.reason: Depth of field is always observable

lighting.lighting_style.reason: Lighting style is always observable in any image

lighting.contrast_level.reason: Contrast is a basic observable quality

allow_unknown_when: flat evenly lit scene with no visible shadows
high key lighting that washes out shadows
product shot on lightbox with diffused lighting
lighting.shadow_density.reason: Some lighting setups intentionally eliminate shadows

allow_unknown_when: diffused or softbox lighting with no clear direction
lighting.lighting_direction.reason: Diffused and multi-light setups lack a single directional source

lighting.temperature_feeling.reason: Color temperature is always visible in the image tone

composition.framing_style.reason: Framing is always present in how the subject is positioned

composition.subject_focus.reason: What the image focuses on is always discernible

composition.negative_space.reason: Negative space usage is always visible

allow_unknown_when: no skin visible in the frame
product-only shot with no human subject
no gloves visible in the frame
product showcase or finished tattoo only
lifestyle content without tattooing in progress
packaging or product shot without ink
static photography with no camera movement
static image with no sense of speed or motion
no visible vibration in the image

tattoo_authenticity.reason: Zero scores mean the attribute is not present — this is valid data

social_media.reason: Zero scores mean low potential — this is valid data
